categories.name: ai-research
categories.description: Foundational AI and machine learning research papers covering transformer architectures, language model pre-training, and large-scale model capabilities.

documents.description: Attention Is All You Need (Vaswani et al., 2017) — the paper that introduced the Transformer architecture
BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding (Devlin et al., 2018)
GPT-4 Technical Report (OpenAI, 2023) — capabilities and limitations of GPT-4

categories.name: space-science
categories.description: NASA publications on earth observation, satellite imagery, light emission analysis, and environmental monitoring from space.

documents.description: NASA Earth at Night e-book — satellite imagery and light emission analysis of Earth
NASA Earth Book 2019 — comprehensive earth observations and environmental monitoring

categories.name: standards
categories.description: NIST frameworks and standards for cybersecurity risk management and AI governance, including implementation guidelines and best practices.

documents.description: NIST Cybersecurity Framework v1.1 — framework for improving critical infrastructure cybersecurity
NIST AI Risk Management Framework (AI 100-1) — guidelines for trustworthy AI development

categories.name: cloud-sustainability
categories.description: Microsoft Azure cloud architecture references and whitepapers on leveraging AI and cloud computing for sustainability and enterprise solutions.

documents.description: Microsoft Cloud Architecture for Contoso — enterprise cloud architecture reference
Accelerating Sustainability with AI — Microsoft whitepaper on AI for environmental sustainability

knowledge_base.name: demo-knowledge-base
knowledge_base.description: Frontier Research & Innovation knowledge base — covers AI research papers, NASA space science, NIST governance standards, and Microsoft cloud & sustainability whitepapers. The query planner routes subqueries to the most relevant knowledge source(s) based on question content.
knowledge_base.retrieval_instructions: You have access to 4 knowledge domains: AI Research (foundational ML papers), Space & Earth Science (NASA publications), Standards & Governance (NIST frameworks), and Cloud & Sustainability (Microsoft whitepapers). Decompose complex queries into targeted subqueries and route each to the most relevant knowledge source. For cross-domain questions, search multiple sources in parallel.
knowledge_base.answer_instructions: Provide concise, informative answers based on the retrieved documents. Always cite sources with document name and section. When answering cross-domain questions, clearly organize the response by domain. If the knowledge base does not contain relevant information, say so clearly.
